# MoneySynth - Financial Calculator Platform

## Site Identity

**Name:** MoneySynth
**Tagline:** Synthesizing Money. Simplifying Growth.
**URL:** https://moneysynth.com
**Description:** MoneySynth is a modern financial platform that helps individuals and businesses make confident financial decisions through intelligent calculators, expert insights, and data-driven tools.

**Mission:** To democratize financial knowledge by delivering intuitive tools, trustworthy insights, and intelligent resources that enable users to make smarter financial decisions every day.

**Vision:** To become the world's most reliable and technology-driven financial ecosystem—where anyone, regardless of background, can understand money, build wealth, and design the future they aspire to.

## Core Purpose

MoneySynth provides free, accurate, and easy-to-use financial calculators for loans and investments. The platform combines human expertise with data-driven intelligence to deliver accurate, easy-to-understand financial solutions. We believe that financial literacy should be accessible to everyone.

## Site Structure

### Main Pages
- **Homepage** (`/`): Landing page with featured calculators and quick access to all tools
- **Calculators** (`/calculators`): Directory of all available calculators
- **About Us** (`/about-us`): Information about MoneySynth, mission, vision, and platform features
- **Blogs** (`/blogs`): Financial insights, tips, and guides
- **FAQ** (`/faq`): Frequently asked questions about calculators and financial topics
- **Legal Pages**: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Disclaimer

### Calculator Categories

#### Loan Calculators (`/calculators/`)
- **EMI Calculator** (`/calculators/emi-calculator`): Calculate Equated Monthly Installments with step-up EMI, prepayment, and part payment options
- **Home Loan EMI Calculator** (`/calculators/home-loan-emi-calculator`): Specialized calculator for home loans with advanced features
- **Personal Loan EMI Calculator** (`/calculators/personal-loan`): Calculate EMI for personal loans
- **Car Loan EMI Calculator** (`/calculators/car-loan`): Calculate EMI for car/auto loans
- **Credit Card EMI Calculator** (`/calculators/credit-card-emi`): Convert credit card outstanding to EMI
- **Loan Eligibility Calculator** (`/calculators/loan-eligibility`): Check loan eligibility based on income and obligations

#### Investment Calculators (`/calculators/`)
- **SIP Calculator** (`/calculators/sip-calculator`): Calculate returns on Systematic Investment Plans
- **Step-up SIP Calculator** (`/calculators/step-up-sip-calculator`): SIP with annual step-up increases
- **SWP Calculator** (`/calculators/swp-calculator`): Systematic Withdrawal Plan for regular income
- **Lumpsum Calculator** (`/calculators/lumpsum-calculator`): Calculate future value of one-time investments
- **RD Calculator** (`/calculators/rd-calculator`): Recurring Deposit maturity calculations
- **FD Calculator** (`/calculators/fd-calculator`): Fixed Deposit returns with different payout options
- **Goal-Based MF Calculator** (`/calculators/goal-based-mf-calculator`): Plan investments to achieve financial goals
- **Mutual Fund Returns Calculator** (`/calculators/mutual-fund-returns-calculator`): Calculate mutual fund returns, CAGR, and inflation-adjusted returns

#### General Calculators (`/calculators/`)
- **Age Calculator** (`/calculators/age-calculator`): Calculate age between two dates
- **Percentage Calculator** (`/calculators/percentage-calculator`): Calculate percentage increase, decrease, and conversions
- **Salary Calculator** (`/calculators/salary-calculator`): Calculate take-home salary, CTC breakdown, PF, gratuity

### Tools (`/tools/`)
- **Home Loan EMI Comparison** (`/tools/home-loan-emi-comparison`): Compare up to 3 home loan scenarios with prepayment options
- **Salary Comparison - Labour Code 2025** (`/tools/salary-comparison-labour-code-2025`): Compare current salary with New Labour Code 2025 impact

## Key Features

### Calculator Capabilities
- Real-time calculations with instant results
- Interactive charts and visualizations (Recharts library)
- Amortization schedules for loans
- Growth charts for investments
- Export functionality (PDF, XLSX)
- Save calculations to localStorage
- Multi-currency support (INR, USD, EUR, GBP)
- IP-based currency detection
- Responsive design for all devices

### Advanced Features
- Step-up EMI: Increase EMI annually
- Part payments: One-time and recurring prepayments
- Comparison tools: Side-by-side scenario comparison
- Goal-based planning: Plan for specific financial goals
- Detailed breakdowns: Principal, interest, savings analysis

## Technical Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js 14+ (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Charts:** Recharts
- **State Management:** React Hooks, Context API
- **Export Libraries:** jsPDF, xlsx (dynamically imported)
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics 4
- **Deployment:** Vercel (assumed)

## Content Guidelines

### Tone and Style
- Clear, accessible, and jargon-free language
- Educational and informative
- Trustworthy and transparent
- User-focused and helpful

### Target Audience
- Individuals planning loans (home, car, personal, credit card)
- Investors planning SIP, SWP, lumpsum investments
- People planning for financial goals (retirement, education, house purchase)
- Salary earners understanding their compensation structure
- Anyone seeking financial literacy and planning tools

## SEO and Metadata

- All pages include comprehensive SEO metadata
- Structured data (Schema.org) for calculators and organization
- Sitemap automatically generated
- robots.txt configured for search engine crawling
- Canonical URLs for all pages
- Open Graph and Twitter Card metadata

## Currency Support

The platform supports multiple currencies:
- **INR** (Indian Rupees)
- **USD** (US Dollars)
- **EUR** (Euros)
- **GBP** (British Pounds)

Currency selector available on calculator and tool pages. Default currency detected based on user's IP address.

## Contact and Support

- **Website:** https://moneysynth.com
- **Support:** FAQ page available at `/faq`
- **About:** Company information at `/about-us`

## Legal Information

- Privacy Policy: `/privacy-policy`
- Terms of Service: `/terms-of-service`
- Disclaimer: `/disclaimer`

This file was last updated: 2025-11-29
For the most current information, visit https://moneysynth.com
